title: Supabase Auth Plugin cannot read properties of null
symptom: The Supabase Auth plugin throws a TypeError indicating it cannot read properties of null when trying to access user roles.
applies_when: Users table name has been changed
not_this_if: Error does not occur in the Auth plugin
root_cause: The error occurs because the Supabase Auth plugin expects a specific table name for users. If the table name is changed, the plugin cannot find the necessary data, resulting in a null reference when trying to access user roles.
fix_steps: Revert the users table name to its original name
Ensure the Auth plugin is configured to point to the correct table name
Test the plugin to confirm the error is resolved
agent_instruction: Change the users table name back to its original name and reconfigure the Auth plugin accordingly.
